helpOutput:
Usage: opencli stackoverflow hot [options]

Hot Stack Overflow questions

Options:
  --limit [value]     Max number of results (default: "10")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: stackoverflow.com
Output columns: title, score, answers, url

payload.title: Readonly Ubuntu 26.06 Desktop with browser
Ubuntu 26.04 terminal contains unwanted key=values list in the command line prompts

Metamodel generator loses generic type parameter for Set<String> in Hibernate 7
Does anyone know how I could make a lambda calculus compiler

helpOutput:
Usage: opencli hackernews search [options] <query>

Search Hacker News stories

Arguments:
  query               Search query

Options:
  --limit [value]     Number of results (default: "20")
  --sort [value]      Sort by relevance or date (default: "relevance")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

  --sort: relevance, date  (default: relevance)

helpOutput:
Usage: opencli ossinsight trending [options]

获取 OSSInsight 热门仓库

Options:
  --limit [value]     返回数量 (default: "10")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: ossinsight.io
Output columns: repo_name, stars, language

Usage: opencli ossinsight collections [options]

列出 OSSInsight 所有 collections

Options:
  --limit [value]     返回数量，默认 50 (default: "50")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: ossinsight.io
Output columns: id, name

Usage: opencli ossinsight hot-collections [options]

列出 OSSInsight 热门 collections

Options:
  --limit [value]     返回数量，默认 20 (default: "20")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: ossinsight.io
Output columns: id, name, repos, repo_name, current_rank, past_rank, rank_change

Usage: opencli ossinsight collection-repos [options] <collectionId>

列出指定 collection 下的仓库

Arguments:
  collectionId        Collection ID，可通过 "opencli ossinsight collections" 查看

Options:
  --limit [value]     返回数量，默认 100 (default: "100")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: ossinsight.io
Output columns: repo_id, repo_name

Usage: opencli ossinsight collection-issues [options] <collectionId>

查看 collection 的 issue 增长排行

Arguments:
  collectionId        Collection ID，可通过 "opencli ossinsight collections" 查看

Options:
  --period [value]    统计周期，例如 past_24_hours、past_7_days、past_28_days (default:
                      "past_28_days")
  --limit [value]     返回数量，默认 50 (default: "50")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: ossinsight.io
Output columns: repo_id, repo_name, current_growth, current_rank, past_growth, past_rank, growth_pop, rank_pop, total

Usage: opencli ossinsight stargazer-history [options] <repo>

查看 stargazer 趋势

Arguments:
  repo                仓库，格式 owner/name，例如 pingcap/tidb

Options:
  --from [value]      开始日期，格式 YYYY-MM-DD
  --to [value]        结束日期，格式 YYYY-MM-DD
  --per [value]       聚合粒度，例如 day、week、month (default: "month")
  --limit [value]     返回数量，默认 120 (default: "120")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: ossinsight.io
Output columns: date, stargazers

Usage: opencli ossinsight issue-creator-history [options] <repo>

查看 issue 创建者趋势

Arguments:
  repo                仓库，格式 owner/name，例如 pingcap/tidb

Options:
  --from [value]      开始日期，格式 YYYY-MM-DD
  --to [value]        结束日期，格式 YYYY-MM-DD
  --per [value]       聚合粒度，例如 day、week、month (default: "month")
  --limit [value]     返回数量，默认 120 (default: "120")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: ossinsight.io
Output columns: date, issue_creators

Usage: opencli ossinsight pr-creator-history [options] <repo>

查看 Pull Request 创建者趋势

Arguments:
  repo                仓库，格式 owner/name，例如 pingcap/tidb

Options:
  --from [value]      开始日期，格式 YYYY-MM-DD
  --to [value]        结束日期，格式 YYYY-MM-DD
  --per [value]       聚合粒度，例如 day、week、month (default: "month")
  --limit [value]     返回数量，默认 120 (default: "120")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: ossinsight.io
Output columns: date, pull_request_creators
